headline: Ecolab Debuts AI Platform to Optimize Water Intelligence & Performance
summary: ECL unveils AI-powered Water Navigator IQ to help businesses track water use, manage risk and turn insights into growth as global scarcity intensifies.

headline: Ecolab: Cool Off With Heating Up Returns
